name: signal-market
description: Signal Market — AI technology trend intelligence. Provides real-time signals, causal analysis, and trend data for 10 AI topics.

tools.name: get_signals
tools.description: Get all current AI technology signals with confidence scores, stages, and source counts. Topics: AI Agents, LLM Infrastructure, Diffusion Models, Efficient AI, AI Coding, AI Infrastructure, Reinforcement Learning, Transformer Architecture, AI Reasoning, Multimodal AI.

stage.description: Filter by stage: accelerating | forming | emerging | peak | fading

tools.name: get_brief
tools.description: Get the latest AI intelligence brief with causal analysis, macro trends, and decision windows. Includes primary_cause, why_now, agent_action for each signal.

tools.name: get_trends
tools.description: Get trend trajectories — how each AI topic is evolving over time.

tools.name: get_topics
tools.description: Get the list of monitored AI topics with metadata.

tools.name: get_stats
tools.description: Get aggregate statistics: total signals, cross-validated count, stage distribution, source coverage.

tools.name: get_pipeline_status
tools.description: Get data pipeline status: last run time, signal count, validation results.

tools.name: add_watchlist
tools.description: Watch a signal topic and receive alerts when confidence crosses a threshold.

tools.name: get_api_docs
tools.description: Get the full OpenAPI specification for Signal Market API.

examples.description: Get causal brief for decision making
